_comment: Mainnet fixtures for the surfpool fork. surfpool lazily clones any account the test touches from the datasource RPC, so these are reference addresses + the ones we must pass explicitly into CP-Swap CPIs.

raydium_cp_swap.create_pool_fee_note: Global program constant (SPL token account). Confirmed identical across sampled mainnet pools via getProgramAccounts(dataSize=637) + creation-tx trace.
raydium_cp_swap.notes: token_0_mint < token_1_mint (byte order). observation_state is the on-chain TWAP oracle we read in M2. amount<128 amm_config[0] confirmed live (236-byte account owned by the program).
